title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Chase AI reviews the release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, noting impressive performance numbers and pricing concerns. Fable 5 is available free on most Claude subscription tiers through June 22, after which it will require usage credits, with plans to restore it as a standard feature as capacity allows.
writeup: Chase AI reviews the release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, highlighting their performance numbers alongside pricing concerns. The access details matter for anyone planning usage: Fable 5 is free on most Claude subscription tiers through June 22, after which it shifts to requiring usage credits. The plan is to restore Fable 5 as a standard feature as capacity allows, tying availability to capacity management rather than a fixed date.
